####################
  Stableswap
####################

Hands-on tutorials covering Curve-style Stableswap 2-asset pools in DeFiPy: working through the abstract interface (high-level ``Join``, ``Swap``, ``AddLiquidity`` operations with the amplification coefficient), and the lower-level primitive interface (direct vault construction and amplified-invariant pool deployment). Each notebook is runnable end-to-end against synthetic pools.

.. toctree::
    :maxdepth: 2

    tutorials/abstract_stableswap_test.ipynb  
    tutorials/primitive_stableswap_test.ipynb
